content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.01%, Bank Nifty -0.96%, Realty -2.2%, Auto -1.52%, Energy -1.62% — broad risk-off with VIX +8.55% to 18.28. IT (+0.41%) and Pharma (+0.59%) are the only green pockets — classic defensive rotation on INR weakness. With 11 holdings already and book +0.65% on the day, priority is locking gains via trailing SLs on winners (COFORGE +9.5%, MARICO +3%, LAURUSLABS +3.8%) rather than adding into a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Slight -1.2% drawdown; gold consolidating after a multi-month rally but ETF inflows 11 straight months and geopolitical hedge intact. SL 121 (-3.3% from CMP 123.64) gives room for normal noise. Position size small enough; hold to thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (PAT +18.3%, India volume +9%), stock at 52w high 843.15. Trailing SL from 828 (entry+1%) to 832 (+1.5% from entry, locks ~₹720 minimum). CMP 844.65, SL gap = 1.5% (above 1% floor). Target raised to 870 reflecting MOFSL 15% upside view and breakout from consolidation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.99,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Massive Q4 beat (+134% YoY PAT, EPS Rs 18.20 vs 13.12 consensus). Stock +9.5% on the position. Current SL 1352.99 is +7.5% above entry — already locking ~₹2,820 min profit. CMP 1378.20, SL gap = 1.83% (above 1% floor). Holding SL as-is (no tighten — gap appropriate for IT-name volatility) but raising target to 1450 reflecting Axis 1690 / Choice 1900 / PL 2020 TP range. Note: this is a no-tighten MODIFY only because target moves; SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Position flat (+0.1%). Q4 PAT +11% solid; refrigerants capex scale-up to Rs 2,300 Cr is medium-term bullish. CMP 2789 vs SL 2760 = 1% gap, very tight already. Morgan Stanley UW at 1870 is the bear case. Hold SL at 2760 (entry-0.9%); won't tighten further given tight gap."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Slight -0.4%; stock at 52w high 9050 area with 3.3x volume, Q4 +29% revenue / +32% PAT, Rs 47/share dividend. Thesis intact. SL 8950 gives -1.3% room from CMP — within tolerance. No SL move needed yet; will tighten once profit accrues."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4%, within calibrated SL absorption. Q4 standalone +34% PAT, Rs 150 div + Rs 12,000 buyback (record May 29) creates near-term price floor. Auto sector -1.52% today is broad-tape, not name-specific. SL 10440 (-3.0% from entry) appropriate; not tightening on a position not yet in profit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-1.5% but Q4 print was strong (PAT +15.1%, volume 6% vs 3% prior). FY27 guidance upgrade to low-double-digit growth. SL 468 (-3.9% from entry) appropriate. Hold to thesis; FMCG defensive rotation still in play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "+3.8% gain, stock at fresh ATH 1274.50. SL already at 1255 (+2.4% above entry, locks ~₹464 min). CMP 1272.10 — SL gap 1.35%, above 1% floor. Holding SL — no-op tighten on stop, this MODIFY is target-confirm. Kotak Sell @ 800 TP is the bear case; near-ATH means I will NOT chase tighter. Target 1320 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8% intraday after gap-up. Q4 PAT +21.5%, India UVG 16%, multiple broker upgrades. Stock had a +7% open then faded — normal post-result digestion. SL 1198 (-4% from entry) gives space for the volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.1%) but at 52w high 872.35 with 3.2x volume. Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY. SL 850 (-1.7% from entry, -1.6% from CMP 864) — already tight. Hold; not tightening further given gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.1%). Stock at 52w high 8144 intraday. Q4 FY26 earnings May 27 (16 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary-event window, no Rule 11 issue yet). SL 7850 (-3% from entry) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 7641m (~5 days) ago — this is a leftover from a prior session. MIS orders should not survive overnight; flagging as concerning but no new BUY/SELL emitted. Engine will likely auto-handle. Will not stack duplicate."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Position small drawdown, SL appropriate, hedge thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 832.00, "reasoning": "Trail to lock ~₹720 min; 1.5% gap from CMP 844.65 preserves room."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1352.99 already locks +₹2,820 min profit; 1.83% gap from CMP is appropriate for IT volatility. Target raised to 1450."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Position flat, SL already tight at -0.9% from entry."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Slight drawdown, SL within absorption, breakout thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Position -1.4%, within SL budget, buyback floor at 12000 imminent (May 29 record)."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Modest drawdown post-result digestion; FY27 guide upgrade supports thesis."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at +2.4% over entry; CMP 1272 vs SL 1255 = 1.35% gap, leave as-is."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Post-Q4 gap fade typical, SL has room, brokerage upgrades supportive."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "At 52w high on Q4 + order book momentum; SL already tight, no further tighten."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "At 52w high, Q4 earnings May 27 still 16 sessions away — outside binary window."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Skipping all new admits this cycle despite several BULLISH-rated candidates (SUNPHARMA +0.08, PERSISTENT +0.06, INFY -0.05). Explicit reject reasons per Rule 18: (1) SUNPHARMA — at 52w high 1857.80, +2.3% intraday, BUT Q4 earnings May 20-21 = 6-7 sessions out, fine for Rule 11 BUT Organon deal integration overhang + stock already +12% off lows means R:R compressed vs entering 1-2 weeks ago. Watch for pullback to 1820-1830. (2) PERSISTENT/INFY/HCLTECH — IT rotation play already captured via COFORGE (+9.5%), which is the cluster-best expression. Rule 10: adding a second IT name when COFORGE is at +9.5% would stack correlation. (3) LAURUSLABS already held — re-stocking pharma via SUNPHARMA would put pharma cluster at ~15% of capital, acceptable but better waited. (4) DRREDDY/CIPLA — earnings tomorrow (May 12) = Rule 11 binary window, NO_ACTION default. (5) MCX — interesting +5% on Q4 PAT +291% but not in current watchlist deep-dive. (6) NIFTYBEES — high VIX day with FII selling backdrop is NOT an oversold-bounce day, it's a continuation-risk day. Book is already 45% deployed across 11 names = adequately exposed; cash buffer 55% appropriate for VIX 18+ environment. Net: management-side cycle, no new admits justified.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book carrying 11 CNC positions, 45% deployed, +0.65% on the day. Winners (COFORGE +9.5%, LAURUSLABS +3.8%, MARICO +3%) all have SLs above entry — capital protected. The HFCL stale OPEN MIS order from 5+ days ago needs engine attention — flagging but not adding duplicate. Cash buffer at 55% is intentional given VIX 18.28 (+8.5%) and broad-tape -1% on Nifty; would want VIX cooling below 16 before pressing deployment toward 80% soft target. Next 24h watch: DRREDDY/CIPLA results May 12 read-across to LAURUSLABS/SUNPHARMA; COFORGE 1387 high — if breaks, trail SL aggressively. CGPOWER and POLYCAB at 52w highs with 3x volume — power/cables capex theme is the strongest active narrative on the book."
}
